content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 27, 2001

John L. Burton, Chairman
c/o Nettie Sabelhaus
Senate Rules Committee
State Capitol – Room 500
Sacramento, CA 95814-4900

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-202

Dear Senator Burton:

As you are aware, we have been working with your staff in response to your letter requesting assistance with the SEI filing requirements for board members of the newly created California Consumer Power and Conservation Financing Authority. Your letter to us was initially treated as a request for written advice. However, questions regarding the members filing requirements have been resolved directly through our Technical Assistance Division staff. Therefore, please consider this correspondence as formal notification that no written advice will be provided regarding this matter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
